PREVIEWING AND EXPORTING TTS

1 - Go to: <robot address>:8089/index.html
2 - Scroll down the page to see configurable TTS-related tags and explanations
3 - To export file > change OutputMode to "file" .
4 - Use Filezilla (or any FTP app - I assume to use for FTPing into the robot and pulling out the actual saved file?)



Some TTS Configurable Tags
<pitch band="0.2">adjusts the pitch bandwidth.</pitch>
<pitch multi=""/>
<pitch add=""/>
<duration stretch=""/>
<duration set=""/>
